_setup_notes.1_get_credentials: Go to https://developers.facebook.com/apps/ → Create or select your app
_setup_notes.2_get_token: Use the Access Token Tool or generate a System User token in Business Manager
_setup_notes.3_permissions: Token needs: ads_management, ads_read, pages_manage_ads, pages_read_engagement
_setup_notes.5_install: Copy this config into ~/.claude/settings.json under mcpServers, then restart Claude Code
